- **GET** `` → `Page[AuditLogOut]` (admin only; filters: entity_type, entity_id, actor_id, action, from_date, to_date)

---

## 2. PYDANTIC RESPONSE SCHEMAS (Key Fields)

| Schema | Key Fields |
|--------|-----------|
| **TokenResponse** | access_token, refresh_token, token_type |
| **UserResponse** | id, username, role, email (masked), phone (masked), is_active, last_login, created_at |
| **UserDetailResponse** | *UserResponse + email_unmasked, phone_unmasked |
| **CourseResponse** | id, title, description, duration_minutes, category, price, is_active, created_at |
| **InstructorResponse** | id, user_id, bio, is_active, created_at |
| **LocationResponse** | id, name, address, timezone, is_active, created_at |
| **RoomResponse** | id, location_id, name, capacity, is_active |
| **SessionResponse** | id, course_id, instructor_id, room_id, start_time, end_time, capacity, enrolled_count, buffer_minutes, status, recurrence_rule_id, created_by, created_at |
| **BookingResponse** | id, session_id, learner_id, status, rescheduled_from_id, policy_fee_flagged, cancellation_reason, confirmed_at, cancelled_at, created_at |
| **AttendanceRecordResponse** | id, session_id, learner_id, joined_at, left_at, minutes_attended, was_late |
| **AttendanceStats** | session_id, total_enrolled, checked_in, late_joins, avg_minutes_attended, replay_completion_rate |
| **OrderResponse** | id, learner_id, status, subtotal, discount_total, total, currency, created_at, paid_at, expires_at, items[], applied_promotions[] |
| **OrderItemResponse** | id, session_id, unit_price, quantity |
| **AppliedPromotionDetail** | promotion_id, promotion_name, discount_amount, explanation |
| **BestOfferResponse** | subtotal, discount_total, total, applied_promotions[] |
| **PaymentResponse** | id, order_id, terminal_ref, amount, status, callback_received_at, signature_verified, created_at |
| **RefundResponse** | id, payment_id, requested_by, amount, reason, status, created_at, processed_at |
| **ReconciliationExportResponse** | id, export_date, file_path, generated_at, row_count |
| **PromotionResponse** | id, name, type (pct_off, fixed_off, bogo), value, min_order_amount, applies_to (dict), stack_group, is_exclusive, is_active, valid_from, valid_until |
| **RecordingResponse** | id, session_id, object_storage_key, bucket_name, file_size_bytes, duration_seconds, mime_type, upload_status, presigned_url |
| **ReplayAccessRuleResponse** | id, session_id, rule_type (enrolled_only, public, custom), available_from, available_until, is_active |
| **ReplayStats** | session_id, total_views, unique_viewers, completion_rate_pct |
| **SearchResponse** | results[], total_count, page, page_size, has_next, query_time_ms, facets |
| **SearchResultItem** | booking_id, session_id, learner_id, learner_username, learner_phone_masked, enrollment_status, session_start, course_title, instructor_name, site_name, order_id |
| **IngestionSourceResponse** | id, name, type (kafka, logstash, batch_file, cdc_mysql, cdc_pg), collection_frequency_seconds, concurrency_cap, is_active, last_run_at, last_status, created_at |
| **IngestionRunResponse** | id, source_id, started_at, finished_at, rows_ingested, status (running, success, failed), error_detail |
| **JobExecutionResponse** | id, job_name, started_at, finished_at, status, error_detail |
| **JobStatRow** | job_name, total_executions, success_count, failure_count, success_rate_pct, avg_duration_ms, p95_duration_ms, last_run_at, last_status |
| **JobStatsAggregate** | window_minutes, jobs[] |
| **AlertResponse** | id, alert_type, message, job_name, is_resolved, created_at |
| **AuditLogOut** | id, actor_id, entity_type, entity_id, action, old_value, new_value, ip_address, created_at |

---

## 3. USER ROLES & ACCESS CONTROL

**5 User Roles** defined in `UserRole` enum:

1. **admin** - Full system access
   - Can: manage users, courses, instructors, locations, rooms, sessions, bookings, payments, refunds, promotions, auditing, ingestion, jobs, monitoring
   - GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE across all modules

2. **instructor** - Session and attendance management
   - Can: create/update/delete sessions, record attendance, check in/out, go live, complete sessions, cancel sessions
   - Can: view booked learners roster
   - Can: upload replays, set access rules
   - Cannot: manage users, create orders, handle payments

3. **learner** - Enrollment and booking
   - Can: view courses, sessions, instructors, locations
   - Can: create bookings, reschedule, cancel own bookings
   - Can: view own orders
   - Can: view replays, record replay views
   - Cannot: create sessions, manage other users, handle payments

4. **finance** - Payment & promotion management
   - Can: view/create/approve refunds
   - Can: create/update promotions
   - Can: access payment records
   - Can: generate reconciliation exports
   - Can: search and export data

5. **dataops** - Data ingestion & monitoring
   - Can: manage ingestion sources (CRUD, trigger runs, test connection)
   - Can: view job executions and stats
   - Can: resolve monitoring alerts
   - Cannot: manage courses, sessions, payments (unless admin)

**Access Enforcement Pattern:**
```python
require_roles("admin")                    # Single role
require_roles("admin", "instructor")      # Multiple roles (OR logic)
get_current_user()                        # Any authenticated user
```

---

## 4. WEBSOCKET ENDPOINTS

**WebSocket Live Room** (`/api/ws/sessions/{session_id}/room`)
- **Protocol**: Query param auth (`?token=<access_jwt>`)
- **Participants**: 
  - Admin/Instructor: full access
  - Learners: must have confirmed booking (`BookingStatus.confirmed`)
- **Message Type**: JSON push (read-only from client, server broadcasts state changes)
- **Messages**:
  - `{ type: "room_state", session_status: <status>, enrolled_count: <int> }` (on join)
- **Manager**: `RoomConnectionManager` in-memory by session_id
- **Disconnection**: Auto-cleanup on WebSocketDisconnect

---

## 5. CELERY BEAT SCHEDULE (Background Jobs)

All jobs in `/api/jobs` endpoint return these names:

| Job Name | Task | Interval | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| **close-expired-orders** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.close_expired_orders` | 60 seconds | Mark pending orders as cancelled if expired |
| **attendance-rollup** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.attendance_rollup` | 5 minutes | Aggregate attendance metrics |
| **replay-access-expiry** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.replay_access_expiry` | 10 minutes | Deactivate replays past `available_until` |
| **check-job-health** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.check_job_health` | 2 minutes | Monitor job execution health, create alerts |
| **generate-reconciliation-export** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.generate_reconciliation_export` | Daily @ settings.RECONCILIATION_HOUR | Generate payment exports |
| **purge-audit-logs** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.purge_audit_logs` | Daily @ 3:00 AM | Archive/delete old audit logs |
| **run-ingestion-jobs** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.run_ingestion_jobs` | 5 minutes | Trigger active ingestion sources (per-source frequency enforced inside) |

---

## 6. PINIA STATE ENTITIES & RELATIONSHIPS

Organize your Pinia stores around these domain entities:

### Core Entities:

**User**
- Fields: id, username, role, email, phone, is_active, last_login, created_at
- Relationships: many Bookings, many Sessions (created_by), many Instructors (1:1 optional)
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Instructor**
- Fields: id, user_id, bio, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: 1→1 User, many Sessions
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Course**
- Fields: id, title, description, duration_minutes, category, price, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: many Sessions
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Location**
- Fields: id, name, address, timezone, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: many Rooms
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Room**
- Fields: id, location_id, name, capacity, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: 1→ Location, many Sessions
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Session**
- Fields: id, course_id, instructor_id, room_id, start_time, end_time, capacity, enrolled_count, buffer_minutes, status, recurrence_rule_id, created_by, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Course, 1→ Instructor, 1→ Room, 1→ RecurrenceRule (optional), many Bookings, 1→ SessionRecording (optional), 1→ ReplayAccessRule (optional)
- Statuses: **status** (scheduled | live | completed | cancelled)
- Notes: `enrolled_count` auto-increments on booking confirmation

**RecurrenceRule**
- Fields: id, rrule_string (iCalendar format), start_date, end_date, created_at
- Relationships: many Sessions
- Statuses: N/A

**Booking**
- Fields: id, session_id, learner_id, status, rescheduled_from_id, policy_fee_flagged, cancellation_reason, confirmed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, 1→ User (learner), 1→ Booking (self-ref optional, for reschedule chain)
- Statuses: **status** (pending | confirmed | rescheduled | cancelled | no_show)
- Transitions: pending → confirmed (admin) → no_show (auto) or cancelled; or pending → rescheduled (new session)

**AttendanceRecord**
- Fields: id, session_id, learner_id, joined_at, left_at, minutes_attended, was_late, created_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, 1→ User
- Statuses: was_late (Boolean)

**Order**
- Fields: id, learner_id, status, subtotal, discount_total, total, currency, created_at, paid_at, closed_at, expires_at
- Relationships: 1→ User (learner), many OrderItems, many OrderPromotions, 1→ Payment (optional)
- Statuses: **status** (pending | paid | cancelled | refunded)
- Timestamps: expires_at auto-set on creation (check via close-expired-orders job)

**OrderItem**
- Fields: id, order_id, session_id, unit_price, quantity
- Relationships: 1→ Order, 1→ Session
- Statuses: N/A

**Promotion**
- Fields: id, name, type, value, min_order_amount, applies_to (dict), stack_group, is_exclusive, is_active, valid_from, valid_until, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: many OrderPromotions (via OrderPromotion join)
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean), temporal (valid_from, valid_until)
- Types: pct_off | fixed_off | bogo
- Logic: applies_to = {"all": true} or {course_ids: [], location_ids: [], etc.}

**Payment**
- Fields: id, order_id, terminal_ref, amount, status, callback_received_at, signature_verified, raw_callback (JSONB), created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Order, many Refunds
- Statuses: **status** (pending | completed | failed)

**Refund**
- Fields: id, payment_id, requested_by, amount, reason, status, created_at, processed_at
- Relationships: 1→ Payment, 1→ User (requested_by)
- Statuses: **status** (pending | approved | completed | rejected)

**SessionRecording**
- Fields: id, session_id, object_storage_key, bucket_name, file_size_bytes, duration_seconds, mime_type, upload_status, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, many ReplayViews
- Statuses: **upload_status** (pending | processing | ready | failed)

**ReplayAccessRule**
- Fields: id, session_id, rule_type, available_from, available_until, is_active, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean), rule_type (enrolled_only | public | custom)

**ReplayView**
- Fields: id, session_id, learner_id, watched_seconds, completed, viewed_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, 1→ User (learner)
- Statuses: completed (Boolean)

**IngestionSource**
- Fields: id, name, type, config_encrypted, collection_frequency_seconds, concurrency_cap, is_active, last_run_at, last_status, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: many IngestionRuns
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean), last_status (string)
- Types: kafka | logstash | batch_file | cdc_mysql | cdc_pg

**IngestionRun**
- Fields: id, source_id, started_at, finished_at, rows_ingested, status, error_detail
- Relationships: 1→ IngestionSource
- Statuses: **status** (running | success | failed)

**JobExecution**
- Fields: id, job_name, started_at, finished_at, status, error_detail
- Relationships: none (tracking/audit only)
- Statuses: **status** (success | failure | late)

**MonitoringAlert**
- Fields: id, alert_type, message, job_name, is_resolved, created_at, resolved_at
- Relationships: none
- Statuses: is_resolved (Boolean)

**AuditLog**
- Fields: id, actor_id, entity_type, entity_id, action, old_value, new_value, ip_address, created_at
- Relationships: 1→ User (actor, nullable)
- Statuses: N/A (immutable log)

---

## Store Organization Recommendations

Create one Pinia store per entity or functional domain:

```
stores/
├── auth/
│   ├── useAuthStore.ts        (login, token, current user)
│   └── authMutations.ts
├── users/
│   └── useUserStore.ts         (list, create, update, delete users)
├── courses/
│   └── useCourseStore.ts
├── sessions/
│   ├── useSessionStore.ts      (CRUD, status transitions)
│   └── useSessionCalendar.ts   (weekly/monthly view logic)
├── bookings/
│   └── useBookingStore.ts      (user's bookings + search)
├── orders/
│   ├── useOrderStore.ts        (cart, checkout, payment flow)
│   └── useCheckoutStore.ts     (best-offer calculation)
├── payments/
│   └── usePaymentStore.ts      (refunds, reconciliation)
├── replays/
│   └── useReplayStore.ts       (access rules, views, stats)
├── search/
│   └── useSearchStore.ts       (query, filters, saved searches, export)
├── ingestion/
│   └── useIngestionStore.ts    (sources, runs, connectivity)
├── jobs/
│   └── useJobMonitor.ts        (executions, stats, alerts)
└── ui/
    ├── useUIStore.ts           (loading, modals, notifications)
    └── useFilters.ts           (shared filter state)
```

---

## Key Notes for Frontend Implementation

1. **Authentication Flow**:
   - POST `/api/auth/login` → store access_token + refresh_token
   - Attach Bearer token to all subsequent requests
   - Refresh via `/api/auth/refresh` before expiry
   - Logout clears tokens and calls POST `/api/auth/logout`

2. **Real-time Updates**:
   - Connect WebSocket to `/api/ws/sessions/{session_id}/room?token=<jwt>` for live session state
   - Subscribe to room broadcasts for enrolled_count, session_status changes

3. **Pagination**:
   - Default page=1, page_size=50 (max 200)
   - Response includes `has_next` for infinite scroll
   - Total count available in `meta.total_count`

4. **Error Handling**:
   - Check exception handlers in `/app/core/exceptions.py` for 403 ForbiddenError, 401 UnauthorizedError, 404 NotFoundError responses

5. **Sensitive Data**:
   - User emails/phones are masked by default; only UserDetailResponse shows unmasked (admin view)
   - Learner phone numbers in SearchResponse are masked

6. **State Persistence**:
   - Store refresh_token in localStorage (or secure cookie)
   - Access_token in sessionStorage or memory
   - CORS enabled for configured origins

---

This blueprint covers the entire API surface and provides all necessary context for building a comprehensive Vue.js frontend with Pinia state management.

### SESSIONS MODULE (`/api/sessions`)

### BOOKINGS MODULE (`/api/bookings`)
- **POST** `` → `BookingResponse` (learner or admin)
- **GET** `` → `Page[BookingResponse]` (auth required; filters: session_id, status)
- **GET** `/{booking_id}` → `BookingResponse`
- **PATCH** `/{booking_id}/confirm` → `BookingResponse` (admin or instructor)
- **POST** `/{booking_id}/reschedule` → `BookingResponse` (auth required)

## 3. USER ROLES & ACCESS CONTROL

**5 User Roles** defined in `UserRole` enum:

1. **admin** - Full system access
   - Can: manage users, courses, instructors, locations, rooms, sessions, bookings, payments, refunds, promotions, auditing, ingestion, jobs, monitoring
   - GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE across all modules

2. **instructor** - Session and attendance management
   - Can: create/update/delete sessions, record attendance, check in/out, go live, complete sessions, cancel sessions
   - Can: view booked learners roster
   - Can: upload replays, set access rules
   - Cannot: manage users, create orders, handle payments

3. **learner** - Enrollment and booking
   - Can: view courses, sessions, instructors, locations
   - Can: create bookings, reschedule, cancel own bookings
   - Can: view own orders
   - Can: view replays, record replay views
   - Cannot: create sessions, manage other users, handle payments

4. **finance** - Payment & promotion management
   - Can: view/create/approve refunds
   - Can: create/update promotions
   - Can: access payment records
   - Can: generate reconciliation exports
   - Can: search and export data

5. **dataops** - Data ingestion & monitoring
   - Can: manage ingestion sources (CRUD, trigger runs, test connection)
   - Can: view job executions and stats
   - Can: resolve monitoring alerts
   - Cannot: manage courses, sessions, payments (unless admin)

**Access Enforcement Pattern:**
```python
require_roles("admin")                    # Single role
require_roles("admin", "instructor")      # Multiple roles (OR logic)
get_current_user()                        # Any authenticated user
```

---

## 4. WEBSOCKET ENDPOINTS

**WebSocket Live Room** (`/api/ws/sessions/{session_id}/room`)
- **Protocol**: Query param auth (`?token=<access_jwt>`)
- **Participants**: 
  - Admin/Instructor: full access
  - Learners: must have confirmed booking (`BookingStatus.confirmed`)
- **Message Type**: JSON push (read-only from client, server broadcasts state changes)
- **Messages**:
  - `{ type: "room_state", session_status: <status>, enrolled_count: <int> }` (on join)
- **Manager**: `RoomConnectionManager` in-memory by session_id
- **Disconnection**: Auto-cleanup on WebSocketDisconnect

---

## 5. CELERY BEAT SCHEDULE (Background Jobs)

All jobs in `/api/jobs` endpoint return these names:

| Job Name | Task | Interval | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| **close-expired-orders** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.close_expired_orders` | 60 seconds | Mark pending orders as cancelled if expired |
| **attendance-rollup** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.attendance_rollup` | 5 minutes | Aggregate attendance metrics |
| **replay-access-expiry** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.replay_access_expiry` | 10 minutes | Deactivate replays past `available_until` |
| **check-job-health** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.check_job_health` | 2 minutes | Monitor job execution health, create alerts |
| **generate-reconciliation-export** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.generate_reconciliation_export` | Daily @ settings.RECONCILIATION_HOUR | Generate payment exports |
| **purge-audit-logs** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.purge_audit_logs` | Daily @ 3:00 AM | Archive/delete old audit logs |
| **run-ingestion-jobs** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.run_ingestion_jobs` | 5 minutes | Trigger active ingestion sources (per-source frequency enforced inside) |

## 6. PINIA STATE ENTITIES & RELATIONSHIPS

Organize your Pinia stores around these domain entities:

### Core Entities:

**User**
- Fields: id, username, role, email, phone, is_active, last_login, created_at
- Relationships: many Bookings, many Sessions (created_by), many Instructors (1:1 optional)
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Instructor**
- Fields: id, user_id, bio, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: 1→1 User, many Sessions
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Course**
- Fields: id, title, description, duration_minutes, category, price, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: many Sessions
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Location**
- Fields: id, name, address, timezone, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: many Rooms
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Room**
- Fields: id, location_id, name, capacity, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: 1→ Location, many Sessions
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Session**
- Fields: id, course_id, instructor_id, room_id, start_time, end_time, capacity, enrolled_count, buffer_minutes, status, recurrence_rule_id, created_by, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Course, 1→ Instructor, 1→ Room, 1→ RecurrenceRule (optional), many Bookings, 1→ SessionRecording (optional), 1→ ReplayAccessRule (optional)
- Statuses: **status** (scheduled | live | completed | cancelled)
- Notes: `enrolled_count` auto-increments on booking confirmation

**RecurrenceRule**
- Fields: id, rrule_string (iCalendar format), start_date, end_date, created_at
- Relationships: many Sessions
- Statuses: N/A

**Booking**
- Fields: id, session_id, learner_id, status, rescheduled_from_id, policy_fee_flagged, cancellation_reason, confirmed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, 1→ User (learner), 1→ Booking (self-ref optional, for reschedule chain)
- Statuses: **status** (pending | confirmed | rescheduled | cancelled | no_show)
- Transitions: pending → confirmed (admin) → no_show (auto) or cancelled; or pending → rescheduled (new session)

**AttendanceRecord**
- Fields: id, session_id, learner_id, joined_at, left_at, minutes_attended, was_late, created_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, 1→ User
- Statuses: was_late (Boolean)

**Order**
- Fields: id, learner_id, status, subtotal, discount_total, total, currency, created_at, paid_at, closed_at, expires_at
- Relationships: 1→ User (learner), many OrderItems, many OrderPromotions, 1→ Payment (optional)
- Statuses: **status** (pending | paid | cancelled | refunded)
- Timestamps: expires_at auto-set on creation (check via close-expired-orders job)

**OrderItem**
- Fields: id, order_id, session_id, unit_price, quantity
- Relationships: 1→ Order, 1→ Session
- Statuses: N/A

**Promotion**
- Fields: id, name, type, value, min_order_amount, applies_to (dict), stack_group, is_exclusive, is_active, valid_from, valid_until, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: many OrderPromotions (via OrderPromotion join)
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean), temporal (valid_from, valid_until)
- Types: pct_off | fixed_off | bogo
- Logic: applies_to = {"all": true} or {course_ids: [], location_ids: [], etc.}

**Payment**
- Fields: id, order_id, terminal_ref, amount, status, callback_received_at, signature_verified, raw_callback (JSONB), created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Order, many Refunds
- Statuses: **status** (pending | completed | failed)

**Refund**
- Fields: id, payment_id, requested_by, amount, reason, status, created_at, processed_at
- Relationships: 1→ Payment, 1→ User (requested_by)
- Statuses: **status** (pending | approved | completed | rejected)

**SessionRecording**
- Fields: id, session_id, object_storage_key, bucket_name, file_size_bytes, duration_seconds, mime_type, upload_status, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, many ReplayViews
- Statuses: **upload_status** (pending | processing | ready | failed)

**ReplayAccessRule**
- Fields: id, session_id, rule_type, available_from, available_until, is_active, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean), rule_type (enrolled_only | public | custom)

**ReplayView**
- Fields: id, session_id, learner_id, watched_seconds, completed, viewed_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, 1→ User (learner)
- Statuses: completed (Boolean)

**IngestionSource**
- Fields: id, name, type, config_encrypted, collection_frequency_seconds, concurrency_cap, is_active, last_run_at, last_status, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: many IngestionRuns
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean), last_status (string)
- Types: kafka | logstash | batch_file | cdc_mysql | cdc_pg

**IngestionRun**
- Fields: id, source_id, started_at, finished_at, rows_ingested, status, error_detail
- Relationships: 1→ IngestionSource
- Statuses: **status** (running | success | failed)

**JobExecution**
- Fields: id, job_name, started_at, finished_at, status, error_detail
- Relationships: none (tracking/audit only)
- Statuses: **status** (success | failure | late)

**MonitoringAlert**
- Fields: id, alert_type, message, job_name, is_resolved, created_at, resolved_at
- Relationships: none
- Statuses: is_resolved (Boolean)

**AuditLog**
- Fields: id, actor_id, entity_type, entity_id, action, old_value, new_value, ip_address, created_at
- Relationships: 1→ User (actor, nullable)
- Statuses: N/A (immutable log)

## Store Organization Recommendations

Create one Pinia store per entity or functional domain:

```
stores/
├── auth/
│   ├── useAuthStore.ts        (login, token, current user)
│   └── authMutations.ts
├── users/
│   └── useUserStore.ts         (list, create, update, delete users)
├── courses/
│   └── useCourseStore.ts
├── sessions/
│   ├── useSessionStore.ts      (CRUD, status transitions)
│   └── useSessionCalendar.ts   (weekly/monthly view logic)
├── bookings/
│   └── useBookingStore.ts      (user's bookings + search)
├── orders/
│   ├── useOrderStore.ts        (cart, checkout, payment flow)
│   └── useCheckoutStore.ts     (best-offer calculation)
├── payments/
│   └── usePaymentStore.ts      (refunds, reconciliation)
├── replays/
│   └── useReplayStore.ts       (access rules, views, stats)
├── search/
│   └── useSearchStore.ts       (query, filters, saved searches, export)
├── ingestion/
│   └── useIngestionStore.ts    (sources, runs, connectivity)
├── jobs/
│   └── useJobMonitor.ts        (executions, stats, alerts)
└── ui/
    ├── useUIStore.ts           (loading, modals, notifications)
    └── useFilters.ts           (shared filter state)
```

---

## Key Notes for Frontend Implementation

1. **Authentication Flow**:
   - POST `/api/auth/login` → store access_token + refresh_token
   - Attach Bearer token to all subsequent requests
   - Refresh via `/api/auth/refresh` before expiry
   - Logout clears tokens and calls POST `/api/auth/logout`

2. **Real-time Updates**:
   - Connect WebSocket to `/api/ws/sessions/{session_id}/room?token=<jwt>` for live session state
   - Subscribe to room broadcasts for enrolled_count, session_status changes

3. **Pagination**:
   - Default page=1, page_size=50 (max 200)
   - Response includes `has_next` for infinite scroll
   - Total count available in `meta.total_count`

4. **Error Handling**:
   - Check exception handlers in `/app/core/exceptions.py` for 403 ForbiddenError, 401 UnauthorizedError, 404 NotFoundError responses

5. **Sensitive Data**:
   - User emails/phones are masked by default; only UserDetailResponse shows unmasked (admin view)
   - Learner phone numbers in SearchResponse are masked

6. **State Persistence**:
   - Store refresh_token in localStorage (or secure cookie)
   - Access_token in sessionStorage or memory
   - CORS enabled for configured origins

- **POST** `/replays/{session_id}/view` → 204 No Content (learner or admin)

### SEARCH MODULE (`/api/search`)
- **POST** `` → `SearchResponse` (admin, instructor, or finance)

---

## 3. USER ROLES & ACCESS CONTROL

**5 User Roles** defined in `UserRole` enum:

1. **admin** - Full system access
   - Can: manage users, courses, instructors, locations, rooms, sessions, bookings, payments, refunds, promotions, auditing, ingestion, jobs, monitoring
   - GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE across all modules

2. **instructor** - Session and attendance management
   - Can: create/update/delete sessions, record attendance, check in/out, go live, complete sessions, cancel sessions
   - Can: view booked learners roster
   - Can: upload replays, set access rules
   - Cannot: manage users, create orders, handle payments

3. **learner** - Enrollment and booking
   - Can: view courses, sessions, instructors, locations
   - Can: create bookings, reschedule, cancel own bookings
   - Can: view own orders
   - Can: view replays, record replay views
   - Cannot: create sessions, manage other users, handle payments

4. **finance** - Payment & promotion management
   - Can: view/create/approve refunds
   - Can: create/update promotions
   - Can: access payment records
   - Can: generate reconciliation exports
   - Can: search and export data

5. **dataops** - Data ingestion & monitoring
   - Can: manage ingestion sources (CRUD, trigger runs, test connection)
   - Can: view job executions and stats
   - Can: resolve monitoring alerts
   - Cannot: manage courses, sessions, payments (unless admin)

**Access Enforcement Pattern:**
```python
require_roles("admin")                    # Single role
require_roles("admin", "instructor")      # Multiple roles (OR logic)
get_current_user()                        # Any authenticated user
```

---

## 4. WEBSOCKET ENDPOINTS

**WebSocket Live Room** (`/api/ws/sessions/{session_id}/room`)
- **Protocol**: Query param auth (`?token=<access_jwt>`)
- **Participants**: 
  - Admin/Instructor: full access
  - Learners: must have confirmed booking (`BookingStatus.confirmed`)
- **Message Type**: JSON push (read-only from client, server broadcasts state changes)
- **Messages**:
  - `{ type: "room_state", session_status: <status>, enrolled_count: <int> }` (on join)
- **Manager**: `RoomConnectionManager` in-memory by session_id
- **Disconnection**: Auto-cleanup on WebSocketDisconnect

---

## 5. CELERY BEAT SCHEDULE (Background Jobs)

All jobs in `/api/jobs` endpoint return these names:

| Job Name | Task | Interval | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| **close-expired-orders** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.close_expired_orders` | 60 seconds | Mark pending orders as cancelled if expired |
| **attendance-rollup** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.attendance_rollup` | 5 minutes | Aggregate attendance metrics |
| **replay-access-expiry** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.replay_access_expiry` | 10 minutes | Deactivate replays past `available_until` |
| **check-job-health** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.check_job_health` | 2 minutes | Monitor job execution health, create alerts |
| **generate-reconciliation-export** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.generate_reconciliation_export` | Daily @ settings.RECONCILIATION_HOUR | Generate payment exports |
| **purge-audit-logs** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.purge_audit_logs` | Daily @ 3:00 AM | Archive/delete old audit logs |
| **run-ingestion-jobs** | `app.modules.jobs.tasks.run_ingestion_jobs` | 5 minutes | Trigger active ingestion sources (per-source frequency enforced inside) |

---

## 6. PINIA STATE ENTITIES & RELATIONSHIPS

Organize your Pinia stores around these domain entities:

### Core Entities:

**User**
- Fields: id, username, role, email, phone, is_active, last_login, created_at
- Relationships: many Bookings, many Sessions (created_by), many Instructors (1:1 optional)
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Instructor**
- Fields: id, user_id, bio, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: 1→1 User, many Sessions
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Course**
- Fields: id, title, description, duration_minutes, category, price, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: many Sessions
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Location**
- Fields: id, name, address, timezone, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: many Rooms
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Room**
- Fields: id, location_id, name, capacity, is_active, created_at
- Relationships: 1→ Location, many Sessions
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean)

**Session**
- Fields: id, course_id, instructor_id, room_id, start_time, end_time, capacity, enrolled_count, buffer_minutes, status, recurrence_rule_id, created_by, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Course, 1→ Instructor, 1→ Room, 1→ RecurrenceRule (optional), many Bookings, 1→ SessionRecording (optional), 1→ ReplayAccessRule (optional)
- Statuses: **status** (scheduled | live | completed | cancelled)
- Notes: `enrolled_count` auto-increments on booking confirmation

**RecurrenceRule**
- Fields: id, rrule_string (iCalendar format), start_date, end_date, created_at
- Relationships: many Sessions
- Statuses: N/A

**Booking**
- Fields: id, session_id, learner_id, status, rescheduled_from_id, policy_fee_flagged, cancellation_reason, confirmed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, 1→ User (learner), 1→ Booking (self-ref optional, for reschedule chain)
- Statuses: **status** (pending | confirmed | rescheduled | cancelled | no_show)
- Transitions: pending → confirmed (admin) → no_show (auto) or cancelled; or pending → rescheduled (new session)

**AttendanceRecord**
- Fields: id, session_id, learner_id, joined_at, left_at, minutes_attended, was_late, created_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, 1→ User
- Statuses: was_late (Boolean)

**Order**
- Fields: id, learner_id, status, subtotal, discount_total, total, currency, created_at, paid_at, closed_at, expires_at
- Relationships: 1→ User (learner), many OrderItems, many OrderPromotions, 1→ Payment (optional)
- Statuses: **status** (pending | paid | cancelled | refunded)
- Timestamps: expires_at auto-set on creation (check via close-expired-orders job)

**OrderItem**
- Fields: id, order_id, session_id, unit_price, quantity
- Relationships: 1→ Order, 1→ Session
- Statuses: N/A

**Promotion**
- Fields: id, name, type, value, min_order_amount, applies_to (dict), stack_group, is_exclusive, is_active, valid_from, valid_until, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: many OrderPromotions (via OrderPromotion join)
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean), temporal (valid_from, valid_until)
- Types: pct_off | fixed_off | bogo
- Logic: applies_to = {"all": true} or {course_ids: [], location_ids: [], etc.}

**Payment**
- Fields: id, order_id, terminal_ref, amount, status, callback_received_at, signature_verified, raw_callback (JSONB), created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Order, many Refunds
- Statuses: **status** (pending | completed | failed)

**Refund**
- Fields: id, payment_id, requested_by, amount, reason, status, created_at, processed_at
- Relationships: 1→ Payment, 1→ User (requested_by)
- Statuses: **status** (pending | approved | completed | rejected)

**SessionRecording**
- Fields: id, session_id, object_storage_key, bucket_name, file_size_bytes, duration_seconds, mime_type, upload_status, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, many ReplayViews
- Statuses: **upload_status** (pending | processing | ready | failed)

**ReplayAccessRule**
- Fields: id, session_id, rule_type, available_from, available_until, is_active, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean), rule_type (enrolled_only | public | custom)

**ReplayView**
- Fields: id, session_id, learner_id, watched_seconds, completed, viewed_at
- Relationships: 1→ Session, 1→ User (learner)
- Statuses: completed (Boolean)

**IngestionSource**
- Fields: id, name, type, config_encrypted, collection_frequency_seconds, concurrency_cap, is_active, last_run_at, last_status, created_at, updated_at
- Relationships: many IngestionRuns
- Statuses: is_active (Boolean), last_status (string)
- Types: kafka | logstash | batch_file | cdc_mysql | cdc_pg

**IngestionRun**
- Fields: id, source_id, started_at, finished_at, rows_ingested, status, error_detail
- Relationships: 1→ IngestionSource
- Statuses: **status** (running | success | failed)

**JobExecution**
- Fields: id, job_name, started_at, finished_at, status, error_detail
- Relationships: none (tracking/audit only)
- Statuses: **status** (success | failure | late)

**MonitoringAlert**
- Fields: id, alert_type, message, job_name, is_resolved, created_at, resolved_at
- Relationships: none
- Statuses: is_resolved (Boolean)

**AuditLog**
- Fields: id, actor_id, entity_type, entity_id, action, old_value, new_value, ip_address, created_at
- Relationships: 1→ User (actor, nullable)
- Statuses: N/A (immutable log)

---

## Store Organization Recommendations

Create one Pinia store per entity or functional domain:

```
stores/
├── auth/
│   ├── useAuthStore.ts        (login, token, current user)
│   └── authMutations.ts
├── users/
│   └── useUserStore.ts         (list, create, update, delete users)
├── courses/
│   └── useCourseStore.ts
├── sessions/
│   ├── useSessionStore.ts      (CRUD, status transitions)
│   └── useSessionCalendar.ts   (weekly/monthly view logic)
├── bookings/
│   └── useBookingStore.ts      (user's bookings + search)
├── orders/
│   ├── useOrderStore.ts        (cart, checkout, payment flow)
│   └── useCheckoutStore.ts     (best-offer calculation)
├── payments/
│   └── usePaymentStore.ts      (refunds, reconciliation)
├── replays/
│   └── useReplayStore.ts       (access rules, views, stats)
├── search/
│   └── useSearchStore.ts       (query, filters, saved searches, export)
├── ingestion/
│   └── useIngestionStore.ts    (sources, runs, connectivity)
├── jobs/
│   └── useJobMonitor.ts        (executions, stats, alerts)
└── ui/
    ├── useUIStore.ts           (loading, modals, notifications)
    └── useFilters.ts           (shared filter state)
```

---

## Key Notes for Frontend Implementation

1. **Authentication Flow**:
   - POST `/api/auth/login` → store access_token + refresh_token
   - Attach Bearer token to all subsequent requests
   - Refresh via `/api/auth/refresh` before expiry
   - Logout clears tokens and calls POST `/api/auth/logout`

2. **Real-time Updates**:
   - Connect WebSocket to `/api/ws/sessions/{session_id}/room?token=<jwt>` for live session state
   - Subscribe to room broadcasts for enrolled_count, session_status changes

3. **Pagination**:
   - Default page=1, page_size=50 (max 200)
   - Response includes `has_next` for infinite scroll
   - Total count available in `meta.total_count`

4. **Error Handling**:
   - Check exception handlers in `/app/core/exceptions.py` for 403 ForbiddenError, 401 UnauthorizedError, 404 NotFoundError responses

5. **Sensitive Data**:
   - User emails/phones are masked by default; only UserDetailResponse shows unmasked (admin view)
   - Learner phone numbers in SearchResponse are masked

6. **State Persistence**:
   - Store refresh_token in localStorage (or secure cookie)
   - Access_token in sessionStorage or memory
   - CORS enabled for configured origins

---

This blueprint covers the entire API surface and provides all necessary context for building a comprehensive Vue.js frontend with Pinia state management.

## 4. Errors and Fixes

**5 corrections identified by user after initial plan approval:**

1. **Missing video storage**: Plan had replay metadata but no actual video file storage. Fixed by adding MinIO service to docker-compose, `session_recordings` table, `core/storage.py`, presigned URL endpoints.

2. **No real-time protocol**: REST-only API would require polling for live session state. Fixed by adding WebSocket endpoint with `RoomConnectionManager`. Broadcasts triggered from within service layer after DB writes.

3. **Wrong promotion stacking default**: Blueprint said `null stack_group → stackable` but spec says "mutual exclusion by default". Fixed: `null stack_group` = singleton pool (only best applies); named groups stack across each other only.

4. **Admin console metric gap**: Plan only had Grafana for job monitoring, but Vue admin console also needs job stats. Fixed: added `GET /api/jobs/stats/aggregate` that queries `job_executions` table and serves JSON to the Vue UI.

5. **Missing quick-filter facets**: Search endpoint didn't return aggregation counts for the filter pills UI. Fixed: `?include_facets=true` returns `facets` block with enrollment_status, site, and instructor counts via GROUP BY sub-queries.

---

## 5. Problem Solving

- **Promotion stacking complexity**: Solved by separating promotions into three groups: exclusive singletons (is_exclusive=True), null-group pool (mutual exclusion by default), and named groups (exclusive within group, stackable across groups). Best combination found via selection from each group.
- **Offline video storage**: MinIO (S3-compatible) deployed in Docker with a `minio-init` container that creates the bucket on startup. Recording access via presigned URLs with configurable TTL.
- **WebSocket auth**: Standard OAuth2 Bearer header approach doesn't work with WebSockets; solved using `?token=<jwt>` query parameter instead.
- **Phone search with encrypted fields**: Decrypt in Python then substring match (suitable for on-prem scale); noted that a hashed phone index would be better for very large datasets.

# Returns: JobStatsAggregate with window_minutes, and per-job stats:
# job_name, total_executions, success_count, failure_count, success_rate_pct,
# avg_duration_ms, p95_duration_ms, last_run_at, last_status
```

**`backend/app/modules/replays/models.py`** — `SessionRecording` table (added for MinIO video storage):
```python
# session_id (FK, unique), object_storage_key, bucket_name,
# file_size_bytes, duration_seconds, mime_type,
# upload_status (pending/processing/ready/failed)
```

**`backend/docker-compose.yml`** — 11 services:
- backend (port 8000), nginx (port 80), db/postgres:15 (port 5432)
- redis:7 (port 6379), celery_worker, celery_beat
- kafka:9092, zookeeper:2181
- minio:9000/9001, minio-init (bucket creator)
- prometheus:9090, grafana:3000

**`backend/alembic/versions/0001_initial_schema.py`** — Single migration: 18 tables + pg_trgm + uuid-ossp extensions + all indexes.

**`backend/tests/unit/test_best_offer.py`** — 9 test cases validating corrected stack logic:
- null group → only best applies
- same named group → mutually exclusive
- different named groups → stackable
- is_exclusive → never combined
- min_order_amount not met → 0 discount
- discount capped at subtotal

**`backend/CLAUDE.md`** — Commands (docker compose, pytest, alembic), architecture notes, key design decisions.

**`backend/README.md`** — Start command, service URLs, verification steps, default admin credentials (admin/Admin@Meridian1).

### Backend API Surface (for frontend planning):

**50+ REST endpoints** + 1 WebSocket endpoint organized across 19 modules. Full mapping:
- `POST /api/auth/login` → TokenResponse
- `GET /api/sessions?week=2026-W14&tz=UTC` → list[SessionResponse]
- `GET /api/sessions/monthly?month=2026-04` → list[SessionResponse]
- `POST /api/bookings` → BookingResponse (learner)
- `PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/confirm` → BookingResponse (admin/instructor)
- `POST /api/bookings/{id}/reschedule` → BookingResponse (blocked within 2h)
- `POST /api/bookings/{id}/cancel` → BookingResponse (fee flagged within 24h)
- `POST /api/checkout/cart` → OrderResponse (auto best-offer applied)
- `POST /api/checkout/best-offer` → BestOfferResponse (dry-run)
- `POST /api/payments/callback` → PaymentResponse (HMAC verified, no auth)
- `POST /api/search` → SearchResponse (with optional facets block)
- `POST /api/search/export` → CSV/Excel binary (50k limit)
- `GET /api/jobs/stats/aggregate?window_minutes=60` → JobStatsAggregate (admin console)
- `GET /api/monitoring/health` → {status, timestamp}
- `WS /api/ws/sessions/{session_id}/room?token=<jwt>` → real-time push

---

## 4. Errors and Fixes

**5 corrections identified by user after initial plan approval:**

1. **Missing video storage**: Plan had replay metadata but no actual video file storage. Fixed by adding MinIO service to docker-compose, `session_recordings` table, `core/storage.py`, presigned URL endpoints.

2. **No real-time protocol**: REST-only API would require polling for live session state. Fixed by adding WebSocket endpoint with `RoomConnectionManager`. Broadcasts triggered from within service layer after DB writes.

3. **Wrong promotion stacking default**: Blueprint said `null stack_group → stackable` but spec says "mutual exclusion by default". Fixed: `null stack_group` = singleton pool (only best applies); named groups stack across each other only.

4. **Admin console metric gap**: Plan only had Grafana for job monitoring, but Vue admin console also needs job stats. Fixed: added `GET /api/jobs/stats/aggregate` that queries `job_executions` table and serves JSON to the Vue UI.

5. **Missing quick-filter facets**: Search endpoint didn't return aggregation counts for the filter pills UI. Fixed: `?include_facets=true` returns `facets` block with enrollment_status, site, and instructor counts via GROUP BY sub-queries.

---

## 5. Problem Solving

- **Promotion stacking complexity**: Solved by separating promotions into three groups: exclusive singletons (is_exclusive=True), null-group pool (mutual exclusion by default), and named groups (exclusive within group, stackable across groups). Best combination found via selection from each group.
- **Offline video storage**: MinIO (S3-compatible) deployed in Docker with a `minio-init` container that creates the bucket on startup. Recording access via presigned URLs with configurable TTL.
- **WebSocket auth**: Standard OAuth2 Bearer header approach doesn't work with WebSockets; solved using `?token=<jwt>` query parameter instead.
- **Phone search with encrypted fields**: Decrypt in Python then substring match (suitable for on-prem scale); noted that a hashed phone index would be better for very large datasets.

---

## 6. All User Messages

1. `/init` — Request to analyze codebase and create CLAUDE.md (repo was empty, CLAUDE.md not created)

   - "Promotion Stacking: Incorrect Default Behavior" — Fix null stack_group = mutually exclusive
   - "'Admin Console' Metrics vs. Grafana" — Add `GET /api/jobs/stats/aggregate` REST endpoint
   - "Missing Support for 'Quick Filters'" — Add facets to search response
4. `/plan` with frontend description — Request for detailed production-grade Vue.js frontend plan, fully integrated with the already-built backend. Specified: Vue 3 Composition API, Pinia, Vue Router, Axios, TailwindCSS, shadcn/ui, vee-validate+yup, date-fns/dayjs, vitest+vue-test-utils. Requirements: all pages per role, component hierarchy, Pinia stores, backend endpoint mapping, calendar views, live room, replay tiles, booking workflows, checkout UI, Docker integration, test coverage plan, README.

---

{"file_path": "C:\Users\bita\.claude\plans\proud-wobbling-canyon.md", "content": "# Meridian Training Operations System — Frontend Blueprint

## Context

This plan covers the full frontend implementation for the Meridian Training Operations System. The backend is already fully implemented (117 files, 11 Docker services). The frontend is a Vue 3 SPA that consumes all backend REST endpoints and the live-room WebSocket. It serves five roles: Administrator, Instructor, Learner, Finance Analyst, and Data Ops — each with a distinct navigation, page set, and data scope. The app must run as a twelfth Docker service that starts with `docker compose up`.

---

## 1. Tech Stack

| Concern | Library |
|---|---|
| Framework | Vue 3 + `<script setup>` Composition API |
| State | Pinia 2 |
| Routing | Vue Router 4 |
| HTTP | Axios (interceptors for Bearer + refresh rotation) |
| UI / Styling | TailwindCSS 3 + shadcn-vue (Radix-based) |
| Forms | vee-validate 4 + yup |
| Dates | date-fns 3 (timezone via `date-fns-tz`) |
| Charts | Chart.js 4 + vue-chartjs |
| Real-time | Native browser WebSocket |
| Testing | vitest + @vue/test-utils 2 |
| Build | Vite 5 |
| Container | Node 20-alpine → nginx:1.25-alpine (multi-stage) |

---

## 2. Repository Structure

```
repo/
├── frontend/
│   ├── Dockerfile
│   ├── vite.config.ts
│   ├── tailwind.config.ts
│   ├── tsconfig.json
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── public/
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── main.ts               # app bootstrap
│   │   ├── App.vue               # root: RouterView + theme provider
│   │   ├── router/
│   │   │   └── index.ts          # routes + per-route role guards
│   │   ├── stores/               # Pinia stores (one per domain)
│   │   │   ├── auth.ts
│   │   │   ├── sessions.ts
│   │   │   ├── bookings.ts
│   │   │   ├── checkout.ts
│   │   │   ├── payments.ts
│   │   │   ├── search.ts
│   │   │   ├── ingestion.ts
│   │   │   ├── jobs.ts
│   │   │   └── ui.ts             # theme, sidebar collapse, toast queue
│   │   ├── api/
│   │   │   ├── client.ts         # Axios instance + interceptors
│   │   │   └── endpoints/        # one file per module (auth.ts, sessions.ts, …)
│   │   ├── layouts/
│   │   │   ├── AuthLayout.vue    # centered card, no sidebar
│   │   │   └── AppLayout.vue     # top-bar + collapsible sidebar + main slot
│   │   ├── pages/
│   │   │   ├── auth/
│   │   │   ├── admin/
│   │   │   ├── instructor/
│   │   │   ├── learner/
│   │   │   ├── finance/
│   │   │   └── dataops/
│   │   ├── components/
│   │   │   ├── ui/               # shadcn-vue wrappers (Button, Dialog, …)
│   │   │   ├── forms/            # reusable form sections
│   │   │   ├── tables/           # DataTable + column helpers
│   │   │   ├── calendar/         # week/month calendar widgets
│   │   │   ├── sessions/         # session cards, status badge
│   │   │   ├── bookings/         # booking state badge, history timeline
│   │   │   ├── live/             # live room overlay + WebSocket hook
│   │   │   ├── replays/          # replay tile, video player wrapper
│   │   │   ├── checkout/         # cart, promo badge, receipt breakdown
│   │   │   ├── payments/         # payment status chip, refund form
│   │   │   ├── search/           # advanced search panel + facet pills
│   │   │   ├── charts/           # BarChart, LineChart, StatCard wrappers
│   │   │   └── shared/           # Pagination, EmptyState, LoadingSpinner, …
│   │   └── composables/
│   │       ├── useAuth.ts        # reads auth store, exposes role helpers
│   │       ├── useWebSocket.ts   # live room WS lifecycle
│   │       ├── usePagination.ts  # keyset cursor pagination
│   │       ├── useExport.ts      # trigger export + stream download
│   │       └── useToast.ts       # wrapper around ui store toast queue
│   └── tests/
│       ├── unit/
│       │   ├── stores/
│       │   └── composables/
│       └── components/
│           ├── calendar/
│           ├── checkout/
│           └── search/
```

---

## 3. Routing & Role Guards

`src/router/index.ts` — route-level meta carries `roles: string[]`. The `beforeEach` guard reads `authStore.user.role` and redirects to `/403` if the role is not in the allowed list. Unauthenticated users are sent to `/login`.

```
/login                         → AuthLayout > LoginPage
/change-password               → AuthLayout > ChangePasswordPage

/                              → redirect based on role

# Admin
/admin/dashboard               → AdminDashboard (sessions calendar summary + KPI cards)
/admin/sessions                → SessionListPage
/admin/sessions/new            → SessionFormPage
/admin/sessions/:id            → SessionDetailPage
/admin/sessions/:id/edit       → SessionFormPage
/admin/bookings                → BookingListPage (all bookings)
/admin/users                   → UserListPage
/admin/users/new               → UserFormPage
/admin/users/:id               → UserDetailPage
/admin/locations               → LocationListPage
/admin/courses                 → CourseListPage
/admin/instructors             → InstructorListPage
/admin/promotions              → PromotionListPage
/admin/promotions/new          → PromotionFormPage
/admin/search                  → AdvancedSearchPage
/admin/audit-logs              → AuditLogPage
/admin/jobs                    → JobMonitorPage
/admin/monitoring              → MonitoringPage

# Instructor
/instructor/dashboard          → InstructorDashboard (own sessions this week)
/instructor/sessions           → SessionListPage (own only)
/instructor/sessions/:id       → SessionDetailPage (with live room launch)
/instructor/sessions/:id/attendance → AttendanceManagePage
/instructor/bookings           → BookingListPage (read-only, own sessions)
/instructor/search             → AdvancedSearchPage

# Learner
/learner/dashboard             → LearnerDashboard (upcoming + enrolled sessions)
/learner/sessions              → SessionBrowsePage (calendar + list, bookable)
/learner/sessions/:id          → SessionDetailPage (book / join live / watch replay)
/learner/bookings              → BookingListPage (own)
/learner/checkout              → CheckoutPage
/learner/orders/:id            → OrderReceiptPage

# Finance
/finance/dashboard             → FinanceDashboard (revenue KPIs, pending refunds)
/finance/orders                → OrderListPage
/finance/payments              → PaymentListPage
/finance/refunds               → RefundListPage
/finance/reconciliation        → ReconciliationPage
/finance/promotions            → PromotionListPage (view + manage)
/finance/promotions/new        → PromotionFormPage
/finance/search                → AdvancedSearchPage
/finance/export                → ExportPage

# DataOps
/dataops/dashboard             → DataOpsDashboard (ingestion run status + job health)
/dataops/ingestion             → IngestionSourceListPage
/dataops/ingestion/new         → IngestionSourceFormPage
/dataops/ingestion/:id         → IngestionSourceDetailPage
/dataops/jobs                  → JobMonitorPage
/dataops/monitoring            → MonitoringPage
```

---

## 4. Layouts

### `AuthLayout.vue`
Full-viewport centered card. Logo, dark/light toggle. Wraps `/login` and `/change-password`.

### `AppLayout.vue`
- **Top bar**: logo, breadcrumb, notification bell (alert count from `/api/monitoring/alerts`), user avatar + dropdown (profile, change password, logout).
- **Sidebar**: role-filtered nav links, collapse toggle (state persisted in `ui` store → localStorage).
- **Main slot**: `<RouterView>` wrapped in `<Suspense>` with `LoadingSpinner` fallback.
- **Theme**: TailwindCSS dark mode via `class` strategy; `ui.theme` toggled by top-bar button.

---

## 5. Pinia Stores

### `auth.ts`
```
state: { user, accessToken, refreshToken, loading, error }
actions:
  login(username, password)          → POST /api/auth/login → store tokens, decode role
  refresh()                          → POST /api/auth/refresh → rotate accessToken
  logout()                           → POST /api/auth/logout → clear store
  changePassword(old, new)           → POST /api/auth/change-password
getters:
  isAuthenticated, role, isAdmin, isInstructor, isLearner, isFinance, isDataOps
```
Access token stored in memory only. Refresh token in httpOnly cookie (or localStorage if cookie not available). Axios interceptor calls `refresh()` on 401, queues concurrent requests.

### `sessions.ts`
```
state: { weekSessions, monthlySessions, currentSession, loading }
actions:
  fetchWeek(week, tz, locationId?)   → GET /api/sessions?week=&tz=&location_id=
  fetchMonth(month, tz)              → GET /api/sessions/monthly?month=&tz=
  fetchOne(id)                       → GET /api/sessions/:id
  create(payload)                    → POST /api/sessions
  createRecurring(payload)           → POST /api/sessions/recurring
  update(id, payload)                → PATCH /api/sessions/:id
  cancel(id)                         → PATCH /api/sessions/:id/cancel
  goLive(id)                         → POST /api/sessions/:id/go-live
  complete(id)                       → POST /api/sessions/:id/complete
  fetchRoster(id)                    → GET /api/sessions/:id/roster
```

### `bookings.ts`
```
state: { bookings, currentBooking, history, loading }
actions:
  fetchAll(filters)                  → GET /api/bookings
  fetchOne(id)                       → GET /api/bookings/:id
  create(sessionId)                  → POST /api/bookings
  confirm(id)                        → PATCH /api/bookings/:id/confirm
  reschedule(id, newSessionId)       → POST /api/bookings/:id/reschedule
  cancel(id, reason)                 → POST /api/bookings/:id/cancel
  fetchHistory(id)                   → GET /api/bookings/:id/history
```

### `checkout.ts`
```
state: { cart, bestOffer, order, loading }
actions:
  createCart(items)                  → POST /api/checkout/cart
  applyPromo(cartId, code)           → POST /api/checkout/cart/:id/apply-promo
  fetchBestOffer(cartId)             → GET /api/checkout/cart/:id/best-offer
  confirmCart(cartId)                → POST /api/checkout/cart/:id/confirm
  fetchOrder(id)                     → GET /api/orders/:id
  cancelOrder(id)                    → PATCH /api/orders/:id/cancel
```

### `payments.ts`
```
state: { payments, refunds, exports, loading }
actions:
  fetchPayment(orderId)              → GET /api/payments/:orderId
  submitRefund(payload)              → POST /api/refunds
  approveRefund(id)                  → PATCH /api/refunds/:id/approve
  completeRefund(id)                 → PATCH /api/refunds/:id/complete
  triggerExport()                    → GET /api/reconciliation/export
  fetchExports()                     → GET /api/reconciliation/exports
```

### `search.ts`
```
state: { results, facets, totalCount, queryTimeMs, savedSearches, loading }
actions:
  runSearch(filters, includeFacets?) → POST /api/search
  fetchSaved()                       → GET /api/search/saved
  saveSearch(name, filters)          → POST /api/search/saved
  deleteSearch(id)                   → DELETE /api/search/saved/:id
  exportResults(filters, format)     → POST /api/search/export → stream download
```

### `ingestion.ts`
```
state: { sources, currentSource, runs, loading }
actions:
  fetchSources()                     → GET /api/ingestion/sources
  createSource(payload)              → POST /api/ingestion/sources
  updateSource(id, payload)          → PATCH /api/ingestion/sources/:id
  deleteSource(id)                   → DELETE /api/ingestion/sources/:id
  testConnection(id)                 → POST /api/ingestion/sources/:id/test-connection
  triggerRun(id)                     → POST /api/ingestion/sources/:id/trigger
  fetchRuns(id)                      → GET /api/ingestion/sources/:id/runs
```

### `jobs.ts`
```
state: { jobs, executions, stats, alerts, health, loading }
actions:
  fetchStats(windowMinutes?)         → GET /api/jobs/stats/aggregate?window_minutes=
  fetchExecutions(jobName)           → GET /api/jobs/:name/executions
  fetchAlerts()                      → GET /api/monitoring/alerts
  fetchHealth()                      → GET /api/monitoring/health
```

### `ui.ts`
```
state: { theme ('light'|'dark'), sidebarCollapsed, toasts[] }
actions: toggleTheme, toggleSidebar, addToast(msg, type), removeToast(id)
```

---

## 6. Axios Client (`api/client.ts`)

```typescript
// Request interceptor: attach Bearer token from auth store
// Response interceptor:
//   401 + not /auth/refresh → call authStore.refresh(), retry original request
//   401 on /auth/refresh → authStore.logout(), redirect to /login
//   Other errors → rethrow with normalized { message, statusCode, errors }
```

Endpoint files export typed async functions:
```typescript
// api/endpoints/sessions.ts
export const getSessions = (params) => client.get<SessionResponse[]>('/api/sessions', { params })
export const postSession = (body) => client.post<SessionResponse>('/api/sessions', body)
// …
```

---

## 7. Pages & Components

### Auth Pages

**`LoginPage.vue`**
- vee-validate form: username, password fields (yup: both required)
- On submit → `authStore.login()` → redirect to role home
- Shows error alert on failed attempts; shows "Account locked, try again at HH:MM" when API returns 423

**`ChangePasswordPage.vue`**
- Fields: current password, new password (yup: min 12 chars, uppercase + lowercase + digit + special), confirm
- POST `/api/auth/change-password`

---

### Reusable Components

**`DataTable.vue`** (`components/tables/`)
Props: `columns` (header + accessor + optional render slot), `rows`, `loading`, `totalCount`, `pageSize`, `currentPage`
Emits: `page-change`, `sort-change`
Uses keyset cursor pagination via `usePagination.ts` composable.

**`Pagination.vue`** (`components/shared/`)
Shows "Page X of Y", prev/next buttons, page size selector (10/25/50).

**`StatusBadge.vue`** (`components/shared/`)
Props: `status` (string), color mapping via a variants object. Used for booking status, session status, payment status, upload status.

**`ConfirmDialog.vue`** (`components/ui/`)
Wraps shadcn AlertDialog. Props: `title`, `description`, `confirmLabel`, `destructive`. Returns confirmed/cancelled via emit.

**`EmptyState.vue`**, **`LoadingSpinner.vue`**, **`ErrorAlert.vue`** (`components/shared/`)

**`StatCard.vue`** (`components/charts/`)
Props: `label`, `value`, `delta?` (percent change), `icon`. Used in all dashboards.

---

### Calendar Components (`components/calendar/`)

**`WeekCalendar.vue`**
- Grid: 7 columns × 24 rows (hourly slots)
- Each session renders as a colored block spanning start→end time
- Color-coded by status: scheduled=blue, live=green, cancelled=gray
- Click → session detail flyout (SessionFlyout.vue)
- Toolbar: `<` week `>` navigation, timezone selector (IANA), location filter dropdown
- On week change → `sessionStore.fetchWeek(week, tz, locationId)`

**`MonthCalendar.vue`**
- 7-column month grid; sessions shown as compact pills per day
- Overflow indicator: "+3 more" → expand popover
- On month change → `sessionStore.fetchMonth(month, tz)`

**`SessionFlyout.vue`**
- Right-side sheet (shadcn Sheet component)
- Shows: course name, instructor, room, enrolled/capacity bar, status badge
- Role-based action buttons:
  - Admin/Instructor: Edit, Cancel, Go Live, Complete
  - Learner: Book Now (if not enrolled) / View Booking / Join Live Room / Watch Replay
  - All: View Roster button → opens RosterModal

---

### Session Pages

**`SessionListPage.vue`** (admin, instructor)
- Toggle between WeekCalendar and list DataTable views
- Filters: location, instructor, date range, status
- Create button → `/sessions/new`

**`SessionFormPage.vue`** (admin, instructor)
- Fields: course (select), instructor (select), room (select), start datetime, end datetime, capacity, buffer
- Recurring toggle: exposes RRULE builder (freq, days, until)
- Submits to `POST /api/sessions` or `POST /api/sessions/recurring`

**`SessionDetailPage.vue`**
- Shows full session info + roster tab + attendance tab + replay tab
- **Live Room Button**: visible when `session.status === 'live'`; opens `LiveRoomModal`
- **Replay tile**: visible when recording is ready; shows thumbnail, duration, view count

**`AttendanceManagePage.vue`** (instructor)
- Roster list with check-in/check-out buttons per learner
- Stats bar: % attended, late count, avg minutes
- Calls `POST /api/sessions/:id/attendance/checkin` and `checkout`

---

### Live Room (`components/live/`)

**`LiveRoomModal.vue`**
- Full-screen modal overlay
- Header: session title, status badge, enrolled/checked-in counts
- Activity feed (scrollable list of recent events)
- Connects via `useWebSocket` composable on mount; disconnects on unmount

**`useWebSocket.ts`** composable
```typescript
// Connects to WS /api/ws/sessions/{id}/room?token={accessToken}
// Handles: room_state (initial snapshot), session_status_changed,
//          attendee_joined, attendee_left, roster_update
// Auto-reconnects with exponential backoff (max 30s) on non-1000 close
// Exposes: roomState (ref), events (ref[]), connectionStatus (ref)
```

Events rendered in activity feed:
- `attendee_joined` → "Jane Doe joined"
- `attendee_left` → "Jane Doe left"
- `session_status_changed` → "Session is now LIVE" (banner)
- `roster_update` → silently updates enrolled count

---

### Booking Pages

**`BookingListPage.vue`**
- For learner: own bookings, filterable by status
- For admin: all bookings, filterable by learner, session, date range, status
- Columns: session name, date, learner (admin only), status badge, actions
- Actions per status:
  - `pending` → Confirm (admin)
  - `confirmed` → Reschedule | Cancel
  - Terminal states → View History

**`BookingHistoryModal.vue`**
- Timeline view of state transitions from `GET /api/bookings/:id/history`
- Each entry: timestamp, transition (e.g., "pending → confirmed"), actor

**Reschedule flow**
- Opens `SessionPickerModal` (mini calendar + list)
- Selects new session → `bookingsStore.reschedule(id, newSessionId)`
- If within 2h → API returns 422 → toast: "Cannot reschedule less than 2 hours before session"

**Cancel flow**
- Opens ConfirmDialog; if booking within 24h of session → warning: "A cancellation fee may apply"
- `policy_fee_flagged: true` in response → shows fee-flagged badge in booking row

---

### Session Browse + Booking (Learner)

**`SessionBrowsePage.vue`**
- Tab: Calendar view | List view
- In list view: card grid per session showing course, instructor, date, enrolled/capacity, price
- "Book Now" button on each card → `bookingsStore.create(sessionId)` → confirms immediately → toast

---

### Checkout Pages (`pages/learner/`)

**`CheckoutPage.vue`**
- Cart section: list of selected sessions with unit prices
- Best-offer panel: auto-fetched on mount (`GET /api/checkout/cart/:id/best-offer`)
  - Shows applied promotions as green badges with explanation text
  - Example: "10% off Workshop A — $15.00 saved"
- Promo code input: `POST /api/checkout/cart/:id/apply-promo` → updates cart
- Order summary: subtotal, discount total (itemized), **total**
- "Confirm & Pay" button → `checkoutStore.confirmCart(cartId)` → redirects to `OrderReceiptPage`

**`OrderReceiptPage.vue`**
- Fetches `GET /api/orders/:id`
- Shows: order ID, date, items, promotions applied with amounts + reasons, total paid
- Print button (window.print() with print-specific CSS hiding sidebar)

---

### Finance Pages

**`FinanceDashboard.vue`**
- KPI cards: total revenue today, pending refunds count, pending orders, exports available
- Revenue line chart (last 30 days) via Chart.js
- Recent payments table

**`RefundListPage.vue`**
- Tabs: Pending | Approved | Completed | Rejected
- Pending tab shows "Approve" and "Reject" action buttons
- `PATCH /api/refunds/:id/approve` or `complete`

**`ReconciliationPage.vue`**
- "Generate Export" button → `POST /api/reconciliation/export` → downloads CSV
- Historical exports table: date, row count, download link

**`PromotionListPage.vue`** (admin + finance)
- DataTable with columns: name, type, value, valid from/until, is_active toggle
- "New Promotion" → `PromotionFormPage`

**`PromotionFormPage.vue`**
- Fields: name, type (select: pct_off/fixed_off/bogo), value, min_order_amount, applies_to, stack_group, is_exclusive, valid_from, valid_until
- "Preview Best Offer" button → `POST /api/promotions/preview` → shows dry-run result

---

### Search Page (`pages/*/AdvancedSearchPage.vue`)

**`AdvancedSearchPage.vue`** (admin, instructor, finance)
- Search panel (collapsible):
  - Invoice number (text)
  - Learner phone (text, masked in results)
  - Enrollment status (select)
  - Date range picker (date-fns powered)
  - Site (select)
  - Instructor (select)
  - Submit → `searchStore.runSearch(filters, true)` (facets enabled)

- **Facet pills bar** (below search panel, above results):
  ```
  Status: [Confirmed (210)] [Pending (80)] [Cancelled (52)]
  Site:   [Downtown (180)] [Uptown (95)]
  Instructor: [Jane Smith (95)] [Bob Lee (60)]
  ```
  Click pill → adds/removes filter → re-runs search automatically.

- Results DataTable: booking ID, learner, session, date, site, status, amount
- Pagination: keyset cursor via `usePagination`
- "Save Search" button → prompt for name → `searchStore.saveSearch(name, filters)`
- Saved searches dropdown → load filters from saved search
- "Export CSV" / "Export Excel" → `searchStore.exportResults(filters, format)` → streamed download via `useExport` composable

**`useExport.ts`** composable
```typescript
// POST /api/search/export with { format: 'csv'|'xlsx', ...filters }
// Uses fetch with ReadableStream to stream large files
// Shows progress toast; on 400 (>50k rows) shows error toast
```

---

### Admin Pages

**`AdminDashboard.vue`**
- 4 KPI cards: sessions today, active live sessions, pending bookings, active learners
- WeekCalendar (small, current week, read-only)
- Recent activity feed (last 10 audit log entries from `GET /api/audit-logs?page_size=10`)

**`UserListPage.vue`** / **`UserDetailPage.vue`**
- List: username, role badge, is_active toggle, last login
- Detail: masked phone/email for non-admin; full for admin
- Password reset button → dialog with new temp password

**`JobMonitorPage.vue`** (admin + dataops)
- Fetches `GET /api/jobs/stats/aggregate?window_minutes=60` on mount + every 60s
- DataTable: job name, success rate (color-coded: green >95%, yellow >80%, red ≤80%), avg duration, p95, last run, last status
- Window selector: 60 min / 6h / 24h
- Failed jobs row clickable → expands inline execution history

**`MonitoringPage.vue`** (admin + dataops)
- Health badge: `GET /api/monitoring/health` polled every 30s
- Active alerts table from `GET /api/monitoring/alerts`
- External Grafana link button (opens `http://localhost:3000` in new tab)

**`AuditLogPage.vue`** (admin only)
- Filters: entity type, actor, date range
- DataTable: actor, entity, action, timestamp, expandable old/new value diff

---

### DataOps Pages

**`DataOpsDashboard.vue`**
- Source health grid: each source as card showing last run status, rows ingested, last run time
- Job health summary from `GET /api/jobs/stats/aggregate`

**`IngestionSourceListPage.vue`**
- DataTable: name, type badge, is_active, last run, last status, connection test button
- "Test Connection" → `POST /api/ingestion/sources/:id/test-connection` → inline latency result

**`IngestionSourceFormPage.vue`**
- Fields: name, type (select), collection_frequency_seconds, concurrency_cap, config (JSON editor textarea, value encrypted on backend)
- For Kafka: shows bootstrap servers, topic fields
- "Save & Test" button → creates source then immediately calls test-connection

**`IngestionSourceDetailPage.vue`**
- Source config (read-only), last run status, "Trigger Run" button
- Run history DataTable: started_at, finished_at, rows_ingested, status, error detail (expandable)

---

## 8. Responsive Design & Dark/Light Mode

- **Breakpoints**: mobile (< 640px), tablet (640–1024px), desktop (> 1024px)
- Sidebar collapses to icon-only on tablet; hidden (drawer) on mobile
- Calendar: week view switches to 3-day view on mobile; month view stays but session pills truncate
- DataTables: horizontal scroll on mobile; priority columns stay visible
- Dark mode: TailwindCSS `dark:` variant classes throughout; toggled by `ui.theme` (persisted to localStorage); initial value read from `prefers-color-scheme`

---

## 9. Form Validation (vee-validate + yup)

All forms use `useForm` from vee-validate with a yup schema.

Key schemas:
```typescript
// Login
{ username: yup.string().required(), password: yup.string().required() }

// ChangePassword
{ currentPassword: yup.string().required(),
  newPassword: yup.string().min(12)
    .matches(/[A-Z]/, 'Needs uppercase')
    .matches(/[a-z]/, 'Needs lowercase')
    .matches(/[0-9]/, 'Needs digit')
    .matches(/[^A-Za-z0-9]/, 'Needs special char'),
  confirmPassword: yup.string().oneOf([yup.ref('newPassword')]) }

// SessionForm
{ courseId: yup.string().uuid().required(),
  instructorId: yup.string().uuid().required(),
  roomId: yup.string().uuid().required(),
  startTime: yup.date().min(new Date()).required(),
  endTime: yup.date().min(yup.ref('startTime')).required(),
  capacity: yup.number().min(1).max(500) }
```

Inline error messages below each field. Submission disabled while `isSubmitting` is true (shows spinner in button).

---

## 10. Date & Timezone Handling

- All API datetimes are ISO 8601 UTC strings
- `date-fns-tz` used for display: `formatInTimeZone(utcDate, userTz, 'MMM d, h:mm a')`
- User timezone preference stored in `auth.user.tz` (defaulting to browser `Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone`)
- Calendar week/month query params formatted as `'YYYY-Www'` / `'YYYY-MM'` via date-fns `format`

---

## 11. Docker Integration

### `frontend/Dockerfile`
```dockerfile
# Stage 1: build
FROM node:20-alpine AS build
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci
COPY . .
RUN npm run build

# Stage 2: serve
FROM nginx:1.25-alpine
COPY --from=build /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf
EXPOSE 80
```

### `frontend/nginx.conf` (SPA routing)
```nginx
server {
    listen 80;
    root /usr/share/nginx/html;
    index index.html;

    location / {
        try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;
    }
}
```

### `vite.config.ts` — proxy dev server
```typescript
server: {
  proxy: {
    '/api': { target: 'http://localhost:80', changeOrigin: true }
  }
}
```
In production the frontend container sits behind the existing `nginx` reverse proxy container. The docker-compose nginx routes `/api/` to backend and `/` to frontend.

### Additions to `docker-compose.yml`

```yaml
frontend:
  build: ./frontend
  depends_on:
    - nginx    # existing reverse proxy
  networks:
    - app

# Update existing nginx service to also proxy / to frontend:
#   location / { proxy_pass http://frontend:80; }
```

The existing `nginx/nginx.conf` gets one new block:
```nginx
location / {
    proxy_pass http://frontend:80;
}
```

### Service port summary after addition
| Service | Exposed | Access |
|---|---|---|
| nginx | 80 | `http://localhost` — SPA + API |
| frontend | (internal 80) | via nginx |
| backend | (internal 8000) | via nginx `/api/` |

---

## 12. API Endpoint → Component Mapping

| Endpoint | Component / Store action |
|---|---|
| `POST /api/auth/login` | `LoginPage` → `authStore.login` |
| `GET /api/sessions?week=` | `WeekCalendar` → `sessionsStore.fetchWeek` |
| `GET /api/sessions/monthly` | `MonthCalendar` → `sessionsStore.fetchMonth` |
| `POST /api/sessions` | `SessionFormPage` → `sessionsStore.create` |
| `POST /api/sessions/recurring` | `SessionFormPage` (recurring toggle) → `sessionsStore.createRecurring` |
| `POST /api/sessions/:id/go-live` | `SessionFlyout` → `sessionsStore.goLive` + WS broadcast received |
| `POST /api/sessions/:id/attendance/checkin` | `AttendanceManagePage` → direct API call + WS broadcast |
| `GET /api/sessions/:id/replay` | `SessionDetailPage` replay tab → opens video player with presigned URL |
| `POST /api/sessions/:id/replay/upload` | `SessionDetailPage` (admin/instructor) → file input + upload |
| `POST /api/bookings` | `SessionBrowsePage` "Book Now" → `bookingsStore.create` |
| `POST /api/bookings/:id/reschedule` | `BookingListPage` Reschedule → `SessionPickerModal` → `bookingsStore.reschedule` |
| `POST /api/bookings/:id/cancel` | `BookingListPage` Cancel → `ConfirmDialog` → `bookingsStore.cancel` |
| `POST /api/checkout/cart` | `CheckoutPage` → `checkoutStore.createCart` |
| `GET /api/checkout/cart/:id/best-offer` | `CheckoutPage` (auto on mount) → `checkoutStore.fetchBestOffer` |
| `POST /api/checkout/cart/:id/confirm` | `CheckoutPage` "Confirm & Pay" → `checkoutStore.confirmCart` |
| `GET /api/orders/:id` | `OrderReceiptPage` → `checkoutStore.fetchOrder` |
| `POST /api/payments/callback` | Backend-only (terminal), no frontend component |
| `POST /api/refunds` | `RefundListPage` form → `paymentsStore.submitRefund` |
| `PATCH /api/refunds/:id/approve` | `RefundListPage` Approve button → `paymentsStore.approveRefund` |
| `GET /api/reconciliation/export` | `ReconciliationPage` → `paymentsStore.triggerExport` |
| `POST /api/search` | `AdvancedSearchPage` → `searchStore.runSearch` |
| `POST /api/search/export` | `AdvancedSearchPage` Export button → `useExport` composable |
| `GET /api/search/saved` | `AdvancedSearchPage` saved dropdown → `searchStore.fetchSaved` |
| `POST /api/ingestion/sources/:id/test-connection` | `IngestionSourceListPage`, `IngestionSourceFormPage` |
| `GET /api/jobs/stats/aggregate` | `JobMonitorPage` → `jobsStore.fetchStats` |
| `GET /api/monitoring/health` | `MonitoringPage` + top-bar health dot |
| `GET /api/monitoring/alerts` | `MonitoringPage` + top-bar bell badge |
| `WS /api/ws/sessions/:id/room` | `LiveRoomModal` → `useWebSocket` composable |
| `GET /api/audit-logs` | `AuditLogPage` → direct API call (no store caching needed) |

---

## 13. Test Coverage Plan

### Unit Tests (`tests/unit/`)

**`stores/auth.spec.ts`**
- `login()` stores tokens and decodes role
- `refresh()` rotates access token
- `logout()` clears state
- Axios interceptor queues and retries on 401

**`stores/checkout.spec.ts`**
- `fetchBestOffer()` populates `bestOffer` state
- `confirmCart()` transitions order to paid

**`stores/bookings.spec.ts`**
- `reschedule()` within 2h returns error state
- `cancel()` within 24h sets `policy_fee_flagged` display flag

**`composables/useWebSocket.spec.ts`**
- Connects on mount, disconnects on unmount
- Handles `room_state` snapshot
- Reconnects after non-1000 close with backoff

### Component Tests (`tests/components/`)

**`calendar/WeekCalendar.spec.ts`**
- Renders sessions at correct time slots
- Week navigation calls `fetchWeek` with correct params
- Session click opens `SessionFlyout`

**`checkout/CheckoutPage.spec.ts`**
- Renders applied promo badges with discount explanation text
- "Confirm & Pay" disabled while loading
- Redirects to receipt on success

**`search/AdvancedSearchPage.spec.ts`**
- Facet pill click adds filter and re-runs search
- Export button triggers `useExport` composable
- Saved search loads filters into form

**`live/LiveRoomModal.spec.ts`**
- Connects WS on open, disconnects on close
- `attendee_joined` event appends to activity feed
- `session_status_changed → completed` shows completion banner

### Coverage target: 80%+ on stores and composables; 70%+ on pages.

---

## 14. Implementation Order

1. **Scaffold** — Vite project, TailwindCSS, shadcn-vue setup, router skeleton, Pinia init
2. **Auth** — LoginPage, ChangePasswordPage, Axios client with interceptors, authStore
3. **AppLayout + routing** — sidebar, top-bar, role guard, theme toggle
4. **Reference data pages** — Users, Locations, Courses, Instructors (CRUD tables + forms)
5. **Sessions** — WeekCalendar, MonthCalendar, SessionFlyout, SessionFormPage, SessionDetailPage
6. **Bookings** — BookingListPage, reschedule flow, cancel flow, history timeline
7. **Live Room** — useWebSocket, LiveRoomModal, attendance check-in page
8. **Replays** — replay tile in SessionDetailPage, video player, upload flow
9. **Checkout** — CheckoutPage, BestOffer panel, OrderReceiptPage
10. **Payments & Refunds** — FinanceDashboard, RefundListPage, ReconciliationPage
11. **Promotions** — PromotionListPage, PromotionFormPage, preview dry-run
12. **Search** — AdvancedSearchPage, facet pills, saved searches, export
13. **Admin tools** — AdminDashboard, UserListPage, AuditLogPage
14. **JobMonitor + Monitoring** — JobMonitorPage, MonitoringPage, DataOpsDashboard
15. **Ingestion** — IngestionSourceListPage, IngestionSourceFormPage, IngestionSourceDetailPage
16. **Docker** — Dockerfile, nginx.conf, docker-compose.yml update
17. **Tests** — unit + component test suite
18. **README** — update with frontend URLs and verification steps

---

## 15. README Additions

```markdown
## Frontend
- App: http://localhost (served via nginx)
- API Docs: http://localhost/api/docs

## Roles & Default Credentials
- Admin:    admin / Admin@Meridian1
- (Create instructor/learner/finance/dataops users via admin panel)

## Dev (without Docker)
cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
# Vite proxies /api to http://localhost:80

## Verification
open http://localhost
# Login as admin → see AdminDashboard with session calendar
# Grafana: http://localhost:3000 (admin/admin)
```

---

## Critical Files to Create / Modify

**New files (frontend/**):
- `frontend/Dockerfile`
- `frontend/nginx.conf`
- `frontend/vite.config.ts`
- `frontend/tailwind.config.ts`
- `frontend/src/main.ts`, `App.vue`, `router/index.ts`
- All stores, pages, components, composables as listed above

**Modify existing:**
- `docker-compose.yml` — add `frontend` service
- `nginx/nginx.conf` — add `location /` block proxying to `frontend:80`
- `README.md` — add frontend section
"}
